title: Stage 3 — map human terms to controlled vocabulary (LLM call #2)
description: Reads the decomposition (stage 1) + the keyword banks for the selected domains (stage 2) and emits a structured map: human term → registry concept (entity_type / analysis_id / set_filter / set_id_pattern / operation_type / metric / concept). Crucially: `maps_to` MUST be a value present in one of the loaded banks — no hallucinated ids. See LLM_FUNNEL_SPEC.md §6 for the locked prompt.

source_term.description: The human word from the decomposition that triggered this mapping.

role.description: Role within the analysis: target_interval, target_entity, test_type, exclusion_entity, required_statistic, etc.

maps_to.description: The controlled vocabulary id (from the banks).

domain.description: Which bank fired this mapping. Empty when maps_to_kind=concept and the term spans domains.

confidence.description: high = accept as-is; medium = surfaces in a confirmation card; low = surfaces with multiple candidates the user picks from.

unmapped_terms.description: Human terms the loaded banks didn't cover. Stage 4 will surface these as questions or as candidates for a new keyword-bank entry.
